title: Saddles Squared
description: All mounts now have 3D saddles with unique, individual textures!
body:
This resource pack overhauls all of the saddles equipped by the player; this includes those which are worn by **horses, mules, donkeys, skeleton horses, zombie horses, pigs, camels, and striders.**

It does **not** make any changes to happy ghast harnesses or ravager saddles.

If you're looking to change either of those, consider trying out **[Harnesses Aren't Ghastly](https://modrinth.com/project/GrwksHqG)** and/or **[Ravagers Have Depth](https://modrinth.com/project/2qGXOYKN)**!

---
---

### Horses:

The vanilla appearance of horse saddles has been mostly preserved, simply with added depth. However, saddles worn by the four major horse variants _(mules, donkeys, skeleton horses, and zombie horses)_ have all had significant changes, as explained below:

- **Mule saddles** were changed to a light tan color to match with their bellies.

- **Donkey saddles** are now a dark, desaturated shade of brown which complements their gray coats.

- **Skeleton horse saddles** have a slightly different model than the rest; this was done to prevent clipping as well as to add some flair! Their design is based off of the color palette used by skeleton horses prior to 1.14.

- **Zombie horse saddles** aren't left out either: they're now based off of rotten flesh!

**NOTE:** To see the updated zombie horse saddles in-game, you'll have to either [spawn in a tamed zombie horse using commands](https://www.gamergeeks.net/apps/minecraft/mob-generator/summon-zombie_horse), or download a mod/datapack which allows them to spawn naturally. I'd recommend **[Zombie Horses From Abandoned Villages](https://modrinth.com/datapack/zombie-horses-from-abandoned-villages)** and/or **[Zombie Horsemen](https://modrinth.com/datapack/zombie-horsemen)**.

![A white horse, a mule, and a donkey are all lined up in a row. All three are wearing saddles.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1257b9222844a5cc3a3c360e14ec128c07bc5c2a.png)
![A zombie horse and a skeleton horse are lined up next to one another. Both of them are wearing a saddle.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ad40cfe22f184009f326120db78ed4539f88a31.png)

**Changes made in version 1.0.1:**

- The models were tweaked to be much more pixel consistent. Previously, some parts of the model were scaled slightly differently which lead to annoying mixels.

- As a result, the textures had to be tweaked as well to match the updated models.

- The skeleton horse saddle has even less clipping now; the saddle is flush to the horse's spine and the underneath is fully textured.

- It's been given an updated color palette as well! Previously, the skeleton horse saddle was based off of _strays_ rather than regular _skeletons_.

---
---

### Undead Horse Variants:

As of version 1.0.1, **Saddles Squared** has built-in compatability with **[Undead Horse Variants](https://modrinth.com/project/dZ11pJyA)**! Each of the mounts added by UHV have their own style of saddle.

_Saddles Squared should be placed above Undead Horse Variants in your resource pack list._

**NOTE: Undead Horse Variants** is **not** a requirement, **this resource pack functions with or without it.**

![A looping GIF which shows all of the undead horse variant saddles from both a front and a back angle. ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/758c49239909f01d178ebe4359b9d9c47bd9b5d8.gif)

---
---

### Pigs:

**Pig saddles** have been translated into 3D with minimal changes -- they remain just as orange as before!

_All pig variants use the same model & texture for their saddles. As far as I'm aware, there's no (reliable) method currently available to give them unique designs._

![All three pig variants are lined up. Each of them is wearing a saddle.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc03f249a3f4747450bdaa886b5fbbcc4a534cc8.png)

---
---

### Camels:

**Camel saddles** have only had one significant change, that being their color palette. In vanilla, camels have vibrant orange saddles much like pigs do, however, I find that it clashes poorly with their tan fur. As such, I've changed it to an ochre-yellow.

![A lone camel shows off its saddle.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d79d5787deb01d33f385f62e806aacee521e041.png)

---
---

### Striders:

**Strider saddles** have had the most dramatic change in appearance: they've been almost completely overhauled! Their new color palette is based off of warped wart blocks and twisting vines now wrap around their bodies to keep their saddles secure.

![A pair of striders stand beside each other. Both of them are wearing a saddle. One of them is shivering. Brrrrr.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5d738bdfae533f81ed0e3c9afba8f862faf2668.png)
